code: export class GangInviteParser{constructor(){this._inviterUsername='';this._gangName='';this._inviterId=0;}flush(){this._inviterUsername='';this._gangName='';this._inviterId=0;return true;}parse(wrapper){this._inviterUsername=wrapper.readString();this._gangName=wrapper.readString();this._inviterId=wrapper.readInt();return true;}get inviterUsername(){return this._inviterUsername;}get gangName(){return this._gangName;}get inviterId(){return this._inviterId;}}
